author: michaelhwang
summary: XSA-all + FullGPTQ int6 + Parallel Muon with improved hyperparameters: MUON_BACKEND_STEPS=10, GPTQ_CALIB_BATCHES=512, LATE_QAT_THRESHOLD=0.20, VE_LAYERS=7,8,9,10. Adds eval-time n-gram interpolation (order=7, alpha=0.40, entropy-adaptive) from pr638.

ngram.description: Multi-order backoff n-gram interpolation with entropy-adaptive alpha, merged from pr638

notes: All changes are env var overrides; architecture identical to SOTA. Targets the 700KB unused capacity observed in seed7 (15.20MB actual vs 15.9MB target). Requires H100+FA3 to evaluate. N-gram cache validated on 8xH100: alpha=0.40 order=7 -> 1.0336 BPB improvement (pr638).
